name: fd-gating-model-typology
focus: How acceptance testing, manufacturing inspection, and certification frameworks classify gate types by verifiability
persona: A quality systems architect who has implemented acceptance frameworks in both software CI pipelines and ISO 9001 manufacturing contexts.
decision_lens: Findings ranked by how well they translate to an AI factory where signal verifiability varies per CUJ and false blocks have concrete token cost.
review_areas: Survey software acceptance testing frameworks (ATDD, BDD, Cucumber) for how they distinguish executable vs. judgment-based acceptance criteria
Examine manufacturing incoming/in-process/final inspection models (IPC-A-610, AIAG APQP) for attribute vs. variable inspection gate logic
Review aviation DO-178C and medical device IEC 62304 V&V for verification (automatable) vs. validation (human judgment) gate separation
Assess FDA design transfer gate models for evidence accumulation patterns: gates that log evidence for later milestone review
Research SPC control chart run rules as a model for trend-based CUJ signals that are not pass/fail
Identify frameworks with explicit gate bypass with evidence logging (deviation permit pattern)
success_hints: Clear mapping from CUJ signal types to gate enforcement modes backed by two framework precedents
At least one framework with formal treatment of false block cost
task_context: AI agent factory uses CUJs with typed success signals to gate work item completion. Challenge: prevent quality regression without wasting tokens on false blocks as human withdraws from review.

name: fd-signal-verifiability-engineering
focus: How property-based testing, formal verification, and LLM-as-judge can upgrade qualitative CUJ signals toward measurability
persona: A verification engineer at the intersection of formal methods and practical test engineering who knows which properties can be made machine-checkable.
decision_lens: Findings that convert qualitative signals to measurable without human judgment rank highest. Findings identifying irreducibly qualitative signals also valuable.
review_areas: Survey property-based testing frameworks (Hypothesis, QuickCheck) for CUJ signal validation techniques
Assess runtime contract frameworks (Design by Contract) for operationalizing observable CUJ signals as invariants
Review LLM-as-judge literature (MT-Bench, Alpaca Eval) for converting qualitative assertions into structured rubric-scored evaluations
Examine chaos engineering frameworks for signal verification patterns confirming observable signals fire correctly
Survey automated test oracle literature (differential testing, metamorphic testing) for CUJ signal comparison techniques
Research irreducible qualitative signal classes in formal verification that cannot be formally specified
success_hints: 3+ techniques to convert observable signals to automatable checks
Clear taxonomy of irreducibly qualitative properties
One LLM-as-judge pattern assessed for feasibility as lightweight qualitative gate
task_context: AI agent factory uses CUJs with typed success signals to gate work item completion. Challenge: prevent quality regression without wasting tokens on false blocks as human withdraws from review.
anti_overlap: fd-gating-model-typology covers gate selection given signal type

name: fd-false-block-cost-modeling
focus: How CI/CD, game QA quality bars, and SPC frameworks model the cost of false positives in quality gates when false blocks cost agent tokens
persona: A platform reliability and cost engineer who treats gate false positive rate as a first-class engineering metric denominated in agent execution tokens.
decision_lens: Findings giving concrete gate sensitivity tuning guidance rank highest. Abstract principles without tuning mechanisms rank low.
review_areas: Survey feature flag progressive rollout frameworks for how they model premature gate passage cost vs. false block cost
Research game QA quality bars: how AAA studios set ship gates and tune to avoid blocking on cosmetic issues
Examine SPC acceptance sampling theory (MIL-STD-1916) for producer's risk / consumer's risk framework
Assess CI/CD gate tuning from large-scale systems (Google TAP, Meta Sapling) for flaky test and retry budget patterns
Survey A/B testing guard rail metrics pattern for gate sensitivity with noisy measurement
Research token cost compounding of gate false positives in LLM agent loops
success_hints: Concrete recommendation for parameterizing CUJ gate sensitivity given token cost vs. regression cost
Practical technique for distinguishing flaky gates from real regressions
Gating strategy for low-criticality CUJs that reduces false block exposure
task_context: AI agent factory uses CUJs with typed success signals to gate work item completion. Challenge: prevent quality regression without wasting tokens on false blocks as human withdraws from review.

name: fd-progressive-autonomy-gates
focus: How aviation certification, medical device lifecycle, and CD frameworks model progression from human-gated to autonomously-gated verification
persona: A safety systems engineer who treats the principal's progressive withdrawal from review as a first-class design parameter.
decision_lens: Findings giving principled framework for when gates can be delegated from human to autonomous verification rank highest.
review_areas: Survey DO-178C Design Assurance Levels for which verification activities require human review vs. can be automated
Examine FDA SaMD pre-determined change control plans for autonomous updates within pre-approved boundaries
Research progressive delivery literature for evidence requirements before gate delegation
Assess NASA NPR 7150.2 IV&V for gradual trust-building in automated verification
Survey automation trust calibration literature (Parasuraman & Riley) for gate handoff protocol design
Examine game dev regression ratchets and quality ladders as progressive gate tightening models
success_hints: Concrete model for which CUJ signal types can be delegated at which autonomy tiers
Framework precedent for envelope gates: autonomous within validated boundaries, human outside
Clear answer on when qualitative signals must remain human-gated regardless of maturity
task_context: AI agent factory uses CUJs with typed success signals to gate work item completion. Challenge: prevent quality regression without wasting tokens on false blocks as human withdraws from review.

name: fd-cuj-bead-linkage-patterns
focus: How to structure the causal link between a bead and its CUJ signals so gate verification is scoped, falsifiable, and not trivially satisfied
persona: A requirements traceability engineer who understands failure modes of vague traceability: gates that pass because the system worked before, and gates that fail from unrelated regressions.
decision_lens: Findings preventing gate gaming and gate pollution rank highest. Findings reducing gate scope to the change's actual blast radius especially valuable.
review_areas: Survey requirements traceability matrix practices from DO-178C, ISO 26262 for linking work items to specific verification artifacts
Examine BDD/Gherkin scenario scoping for rules preventing scope inflation that reduces gate sensitivity
Research change impact analysis (call graph coverage, blast radius estimation) for computing which CUJ signals a bead plausibly affects
Assess mutation testing frameworks as models for CUJ gate validation: verifying gates catch introduced regressions
Survey feature flag experimentation for isolating treatment effects and attributing signal changes to specific beads
Examine program slicing literature for computing CUJ signal relevance per changed file set
success_hints: Algorithm for computing CUJ gate relevance per bead based on changed files and signal dependencies
Technique for distinguishing signal improvement from this bead vs. unrelated concurrent changes
Scoping rule for full vs. partial vs. no CUJ gate evaluation per bead
task_context: AI agent factory uses CUJs with typed success signals to gate work item completion. Challenge: prevent quality regression without wasting tokens on false blocks as human withdraws from review.
anti_overlap: fd-false-block-cost-modeling covers threshold tuning for false positives
